hero.title: Empowering Minds Through Psychology & Behavioural Science
hero.subtitle: Enhance your understanding of human behaviour, emotional intelligence, and professional skills through expert-led programs and research-driven learning.

preview.title: A platform for psychological learning & research
preview.description: The Council for Mind and Behavioural Studies (CMBS) is an autonomous professional council established with the vision of promoting education, research, and professional excellence in the fields of psychology, behavioural science, cognitive development, and human potential.

pricingInfo.title: Program Information
items: Affordable pricing based on program level

features: Focus on mental wellness and behavioural competence

reviews.name: Arjun Nair
reviews.text: The programs are very insightful and practical. Helped me understand human behaviour deeply.

reviews.name: Shifa Rahman
reviews.text: Great platform for learning psychology and improving emotional intelligence.

reviews.name: Rahul Das
reviews.text: Well-structured courses with good academic and practical balance.

hero.title: About CMBS
hero.subtitle: Advancing the science of mind, behaviour, and human potential.

intro.title: Council for Mind and Behavioural Studies
description: CMBS is an autonomous professional council dedicated to promoting education, research, and excellence in psychology and behavioural sciences.
We bridge academic knowledge with real-world application through structured programs, research, and professional training.

quality.title: Quality Policy
description: We ensure academic credibility, continuous improvement, and evidence-based learning in all programs.
Our focus is delivering high-quality education with real-world relevance and professional impact.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description: We believe understanding the human mind is essential for a better society. Through education and research, we develop emotionally intelligent, self-aware individuals who create meaningful impact.
